title: Italian Brain Rot
description: Add more than 12 creatures from the ITALIAN BRAIN ROT!
body:
This ITALIAN BRAIN ROT mod, as the name suggests, brings creatures from the AI-created universe called ITALIAN BRAIN ROT to MINECRAFT while maintaining a visual aesthetic that remains friendly to the vanilla art style.

By executing the command /start, you will summon "Herios, the Brain Rot Seller" a silent merchant who offers spawn eggs for all the custom creatures featured in the mod. These spawn eggs are not obtained freely; each one requires a specific combination of items, encouraging players to gather, explore, and trade strategically.

Each creature is unlocked through its own unique trade. For example:

- Tung Tung Tung Sahur: 16 oak wood blocks + 64 sticks
  
- Tralalero Tralala: 16 kelp + 1 water bucket
  
- Chimpanzini Bananini: 16 melon slices + 5 melon seeds
  
- Frigo Camelo: 16 wheat + 5 leather
  
- Bombardiro Crocodilo: 16 lily pads + 5 iron ingots
  
- La Vaca Saturno Saturnita: 16 leather + 10 wheat
  
- Burbaloni Luliloli: 16 sand + 5 leather
  
- Brr Brr Patapin: 16 oak leaves + 6 oak logs
  
- Herioscuino Tanquini: 16 iron ingots + 2 wheat seeds
  
- Lirili Larila: 16 cactus + 10 sand
  
- Tripi Tropi Tropa Tripa: 16 salmon + 1 water bucket
  
- Ballerina Capuchina: 16 pink wool + 5 white wool
  
- Boneca Ambalabu: 16 slime balls + 5 black wool

Key Features:
Over a dozen original entities such as Lirili Larila, Tripi Tropi Tropa Tripa, Ballerina Capuchina, Boneca Ambalabu, and more.

Spawn eggs available exclusively through custom trade interactions with the Brain Rot Seller.

Fully animated using GeckoLib, with smooth transitions and detailed movement.

Designed with a vintage pixel art aesthetic, perfectly compatible with vanilla Minecraft visuals.

This mod is ideal for players seeking to enrich their world with unusual, creative, and mysterious creatures—adding depth to exploration, resource collection, and world-building. BrainRot is more than just a content mod: it delivers a light narrative experience through its custom entities and trading system, all while respecting the original tone and atmosphere of Minecraft.
